# Congxing Cai

Congxing Cai is an AI founder-operator, Partner and CTO at Embedding VC, and former engineering leader at Snap and Google.

Core areas:
- AI-native products
- ML systems
- large-scale consumer platforms
- founder support
- technical recruiting
- venture studio building
- NLP and information retrieval

Notable experience:
- Led Snap Discover & Stories engineering
- Built ads systems at Google
- Founded Youpi Inc., building Realm AI and Synco AI
- Research experience at USC/ISI, Penn State, and MSRA

Current interests:
- GenAI creative tools
- Physical AI
- LLM foundations
- AI recruiting and talent intelligence
- data and evaluation workflows
- agentic systems
